title: Pavitra Rishta
subTitle: Manav, a humble mechanic, is deeply in love with Archana, a hardworking middle-class girl. They marry, but their happiness is soon overshadowed by a series of crises within their family.

title: Kanha Ki Radhika
subTitle: Radhika, an ardent devotee of Lord Krishna, often seeks refuge in the Almighty. Soon, she meets the love of her life, Dev and the two face several obstacles in their relationship.

subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Ek Mahanayak: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar
subTitle: Preyed upon due to socio-economic discrimination, Bhimrao Ramji Ambedkar, a young boy from a poor family, strives for basic human rights and equality for all.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Batti Gul Meter Chalu
subTitle: Interlinked in a love triangle, three childhood friends tumble into a courtroom drama when a printing press owned by one of them receives an inflated electricity bill.

title: Dhadak
subTitle: A world of uncertainties awaits Madhu and Parthavi as their love transcends class divides and blossoms despite the fierce disapproval of their families.

title: Mrs. Chatterjee vs Norway
subTitle: Debika Chatterjee, an Indian woman living in Norway with her family, fights to regain custody of her children after Norwegian authorities take them away from her.

title: Phone Bhoot
subTitle: Inspired by stories from their childhood, two young men create a business around capturing ghosts. However, their endeavour turns dangerous when they must fulfil their promise to a poltergeist.

title: Satyaprem Ki Katha
subTitle: Satyaprem tries hard to prove himself as a worthy person and restore the faith in the love of Khata, who is overwhelmed by her breakup.

title: Rustom
subTitle: Rustom, a naval officer, shares a happy relationship with his wife Cynthia. Soon, he discovers her affair with Vikram, a close friend, and is accused of murdering him.

title: Rustom
subTitle: Rustom, a naval officer, shares a happy relationship with his wife Cynthia. Soon, he discovers her affair with Vikram, a close friend, and is accused of murdering him.

title: India Lockdown
subTitle: The lives of four individuals - a father, his pilot daughter, a prostitute, and a migrant worker - are thrown into turmoil when the Indian government announces a nationwide lockdown.

title: Murder 2
subTitle: When a slew of sex workers disappear, Arjun, a former police officer, is brought in to crack the case. Subsequently, as he works undercover with Reshma, a young prostitute, she too disappears.

title: The Last Color
subTitle: Choti, a young tightrope walker, wishes to pursue her education but struggles to make a living. She soon befriends Noor, a widow who yearns to play Holi but is forced to live a life of abstinence.

title: Poorna
subTitle: Poorna Malavath, a 13-year-old girl from Telangana, becomes the youngest female in history to climb and reach the summit of Mount Everest.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Vicky Donor
subTitle: Vicky, a lively young man, works as a sperm donor for Dr Baldev Chaddha and proves to be highly successful. Consequently, Baldev's clinic thrives with the help of Vicky's contributions.

title: English Vinglish
subTitle: A housewife and caterer, Shashi, is usually mocked by her family for not knowing English. Her attempt to learn the language helps her rediscover herself and reassert her value as a mother and a wife.

title: Taal
subTitle: A businessman's budding romance with an aspiring singer faces challenges as he departs, leaving her suave manager to step in and complicate their relationship.

title: Go Goa Gone
subTitle: Things take a dangerous turn when the aftermath of a rave party causes three friends to get stranded on an isolated island infested with zombies.

title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Gangster
subTitle: Simran, who relocates to Seoul, is distraught when Daya, a gangster, re-enters her life. She has to make a choice between him and her lover Akash, who is a singer at an Indian restaurant.

title: Gangster
subTitle: Simran, who relocates to Seoul, is distraught when Daya, a gangster, re-enters her life. She has to make a choice between him and her lover Akash, who is a singer at an Indian restaurant.

title: Boom
subTitle: Three clueless models bumble their way into the Bombay underworld after hilariously botching a diamond smuggling deal to the Middle East.

title: Jawaani Jaaneman
subTitle: Jazz, a 40-year-old man, leads a frivolous casanova lifestyle in London. However, when Tia, a young woman claiming to be his daughter, enters his life, he decides to mend his ways.

title: Omerta
subTitle: Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British terrorist of Pakistani descent, plots the kidnapping and murder of Wall Street Journal journalist Daniel Pearl.

title: Aatma: Feel It Around You
subTitle: After losing the custody of his daughter Nia to his wife, Maya, Abhay dies in a car accident. However, his spirit continues to haunt their happy and peaceful life.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Oh, My God!!
subTitle: A man sets his sights on getting others to invest in a savings scheme.

title: Love Hostel
subTitle: A series of bloodshed, escapes and deception ensue when Jyothi and Ashu elope together and her family hires a ruthless mercenary to kill the couple.

title: Jeena Sirf Merre Liye
subTitle: Two friends, Pooja and Karan, get separated after Pooja relocates to the city. As grown-ups, although the two meet, they do not recognise each other and continue to search for one another.

title: Andaaz
subTitle: After his sweetheart Kajal marries another man, Raj moves to Cape Town. He eventually agrees to marry Jiya but is shocked to find that she is Kajal's widowed sister-in-law.

title: Tarla
subTitle: With dreams bigger than every social barrier known to women, Tarla Dalal embarks on an inspirational journey to change the country's culinary landscape.

title: Bawaal
subTitle: A small-town man falls in love with the prettiest girl in town. However, he ends up marrying her in order to raise his social standing.

title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: Fear Files. Darr Ki Sachi Tasveer
subTitle: A series packed with spine-chilling stories of paranormal events and thrilling investigations. Get ready for eerie encounters that will keep you on the edge of your seat!
